title: Frequently asked questions
description: Find quick answers to the most common questions. If you have more questions, we'd love to hear from you.
noResultsDescription: Try different search terms or <contact>contact us directly</contact>.
ctaDescription: We're happy to help. Contact us for a personal consultation.

0.question: How can I reach you?
0.answer: You can reach us through the contact form on this website. We are also available by email (info@nataliezimmermann.de) and phone (040 / 53790578). Visit our contact page for full contact details.

1.question: How much does one hour of personal training cost?
1.answer: The cost of one hour of personal training at Body & Mind by Natalie Zimmermann varies depending on your individual needs and requirements. We offer tailored training programs based on your goals, fitness level, and availability. For detailed pricing and a personalized offer, please contact us directly.

2.question: How does scheduling work?
2.answer: Contact us via the contact form or by phone and schedule your preferred appointment flexibly. We are happy to adapt to your schedule and find the best time together.

3.question: Where does training take place?
3.answer: Training takes place at our Body & Mind Studio in Hamburg-Harvestehude. Our space is in a beautiful Art Nouveau villa at Rothenbaumchaussee 156, 20149 Hamburg. We also offer online training.

4.question: What types of training do you offer?
4.answer: We offer a broad range of training options: boxing, kickboxing, personal training, mental coaching, massage, physical therapy, fascia training, Lu Jong yoga, and more. Every session is tailored to your needs.

5.question: Do I need prior experience?
5.answer: No prior experience is required. We adapt training to your individual fitness level. Whether beginner or advanced—we have the right program for you.

6.question: Does Natalie Zimmermann offer Wingwave coaching in Hamburg?
6.answer: Yes. Natalie Zimmermann is a mental coach specializing in Wingwave and offers Wingwave coaching at the Body & Mind Studio in Hamburg-Harvestehude (Rothenbaumchaussee 156, 20149 Hamburg). Wingwave is a neurobiologically grounded method for quickly resolving emotional blocks and stress—combined with personal training and physical therapy. Appointments: info@nataliezimmermann.de or 040 / 53790578.
